name: Casserole Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 package Spinach, frozen chopped; thawed & squeezed dry
1 lb Sweet Italian sausage; cooked, drained, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the spinach, cream of mushroom soup, garlic, and seasonings.
2. Spread the mixture evenly over the noodles or other pasta in a buttered 3-quart flat casserole dish.
3. Distribute the chopped cooked sausage over the spinach mixture and sprinkle chopped onion on top of the sausage.
4. Blend the egg into the ricotta cheese.
5. Spread the ricotta mixture over everything.
6. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow to cool slightly.
7. Top with a garnish of tomato and parsley.
